3317480.name: Pixel Waifu: Escape from the dark corporation. The telepathic power of a lovestruck otaku
3317480.description:
A 24-year-old teenager, a telepathic signal, and a ridiculously epic mission. Miguel Bolaños, an ordinary guy, has just been recruited for the adventure of a lifetime: to rescue an alien trapped in the depths of an evil corporation... and maybe, finally lose his virginity. Face hordes of inept scientists and underpaid office workers in a pixel art odyssey filled with action, humor, and absurdly entertaining situations.

Do you have what it takes to save the day... and Miguel? The adventure is just beginning!

Pixel Waifu: Escape from the dark corporation. The telepathic power of a lovestruck otaku is a 2D action-adventure run and gun game with pixel art graphics and a satirical storyline. You play as Miguel Bolaños, a simple 24-year-old who one day receives a signal to rescue a waifu trapped deep within an evil corporation. Face hordes of incompetent scientists and underpaid office workers as you progress through levels packed with challenges, shooting, and absurd humor. With fast-paced combat mechanics and platforming, Pixel Waifu offers an intense, fun, and unique experience for retro and comedy lovers.
3317480.supported_languages:
西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 韩语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
